brand_dna.category: Melbourne-based Australian designer womenswear selling limited-run investment pieces in prints, knitwear, tailoring and event dressing.
brand_dna.core_belief: Creating pieces that make women feel confident, comfortable, and truly themselves, designed to stand the test of time.
proof_points: Produced in limited quantities, each piece as rare as it is beautiful
Crafted from premium materials with a focus on natural fibres
Inclusive sizing from AU 6-20 plus a dedicated Under 5'4 (162cm) range
Melbourne based and female founded, with B1G1 giving that has raised $12,802 for 'Protect a woman' and more
brand_dna.positioning: Premium boutique end of the market - considered, print-led investment dressing, not fast fashion or minimalist basics.

voice_pillars.name: Considered Craft
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to design intention, fabric and longevity rather than trend or hype.

voice_pillars.name: Effortless Sophistication
voice_pillars.desc: Frames pieces as elevated yet easy-to-wear staples for the modern woman.
voice_pillars.quote: women who value effortless style, versatility, and modern sophistication

voice_pillars.name: Fabric-First Sensory
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with how a garment feels and moves, using tactile, sensory language.
voice_pillars.quote: Inspiration begins with texture and fabric - how it feels, how it moves

voice_pillars.name: Quietly Confident
voice_pillars.desc: Positions the label as rare, sought-after and enduring without loud claims.
voice_pillars.quote: one of Australia's most sought-after boutique labels

phrases: Unique patterns, quality craftsmanship & endless versatility
each piece as rare as it is beautiful
made to last for years to come
Refined lengths & proportions. No tailoring needed!
investment pieces made to be worn season after season

icp: Style-conscious Australian women (including petites 5'4 and under) who value quality, versatility and print-led design and are happy to invest in timeless boutique pieces they will wear season after season.

personas.name: The Investment Dresser
personas.description: Values quality and longevity over trends and is moved by 'made to last' and premium natural-fibre craftsmanship.

personas.name: The Petite Seeker
personas.description: A woman 5'4 (162cm) and under tired of tailoring, drawn by the Under 5'4 range with refined lengths and proportions.

personas.name: The Event Ready
personas.description: Shopping for occasion and event dressing, moved by unique prints and statement pieces that earn compliments.

offers: 10% off your first order for email subscribers
Free AU shipping on orders over $250

Same day dispatch & click & collect, plus instant exchanges

allowed.claim: Produced in limited quantities, each piece as rare as it is beautiful.
Crafted from premium materials with a focus on natural fibres.
Inclusive sizing from AU 6-20, plus an Under 5'4 range for women 162cm and under.
Melbourne based and female founded, founded by Belinda Abbott.
Free AU shipping on orders over $250.
Through our B1G1 collaboration every order helps support women and children.

banned.claim: Any wording that a garment or fabric treats, cures or prevents a health condition (e.g. eczema-safe, relieves pain).
banned.why: Disease claim - banned for this regulated category regardless of product type.

banned.claim: 'Clinically proven' quality or performance without a cited study.
banned.why: Compliance rules ban 'clinically proven' claims that are not backed by a cited source.

banned.claim: Guaranteed outcomes or specific timelines (e.g. 'guaranteed to last a lifetime').
banned.why: Compliance rules ban guaranteed results and specific timelines to an outcome.

banned.claim: Unqualified sustainability or 'eco' claims (e.g. 'fully sustainable', 'ethical' without proof).
banned.why: FTC/ACCC-style rules - unqualified sustainability claims are not supported by anything stated on the site.

banned.claim: Testimonials that imply a health or wellness benefit.
banned.why: Testimonials implying a disease benefit are treated as disease claims under the compliance rules.
